# SVS Digital

> Professional digital agency specializing in AI automation, e-commerce stores, websites, and custom web solutions. Based in Slovenia, serving clients globally.

## About

SVS Digital is a premium digital agency founded by Uroš Jovanović. We combine 10+ years of experience with cutting-edge AI technology to deliver high-performance digital solutions. We maintain a 5.0 Google rating and have served 500+ clients across various industries.

## Services

- [AI Solutions](/ai-solutions): Intelligent automation, AI chatbots, predictive analytics, process automation, and smart personalization. Starting from custom pricing.
- [Online Stores](/online-stores): WooCommerce-based e-commerce stores with 10/10 CRO optimization, secure checkout, and mobile-first design. Starting from €399.
- [Websites](/websites): Professional business websites optimized for lead generation and conversions. Starting from €299.
- [Custom Projects](/custom-project): Fully bespoke web applications, SaaS platforms, and enterprise solutions. Custom pricing.

## Key Differentiators

- 5.0 Google Rating from verified clients
- 10+ years of web development experience
- 500+ successfully delivered projects
- Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
- Efficient delivery timelines
- WooCommerce open-source foundation (no vendor lock-in)
- AI-powered solutions for business automation

## Contact

- Website: https://fast-store-launch.lovable.app
- Consultation: https://calendly.com/svsdigital/free-consultation
- Location: Slovenia
